name: Panache Beverage Inc.
summary: Panache Beverage Inc., an alcoholic beverage company, develops, sells, and markets spirit brands. Its brands include Wodka Vodka, Alibi American Whiskey, Alchemia Infused Vodka, Spirytus Vodka, and Old South Shine Vodka. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in New York, New York.
